hints: Complemento: su laptop durante una presentación importante
hintDisplay: Sujeto: Sara / Verbo: chocar (condicional mixto: pasado → presente) / Complemento: su laptop durante una presentación importante
spanishSentence: Si Sara no hubiera ignorado las advertencias de software, su laptop no se habría bloqueado durante la presentación importante.
correctSentence: If Sara had not ignored the software warnings, her laptop would not have crashed during the important presentation.

hints: Complemento: tu dispositivo a la red inalámbrica (your device to the wireless network)

correctSentence: If you had learned network configuration, you would connect your device to the wireless network now.

hints: Tiempo: ahora (present result from past condition)

correctSentence: If Sara had learned programming, she would be updating her operating system now.

correctSentence: If Miguel had updated the software, he would not be troubleshooting now.

correctSentence: If the app had had more users, it would have crashed during the important presentation.
